title: task
description: compact_cot.py:785 - speed_cm_s is packed as unsigned 16-bit int (struct '>H'), limiting speed to 655.35 m/s (2359 km/h). Fast military/supersonic aircraft exceed this. struct.pack raises error for speed_cm_s > 65535. Failure scenario: Fighter jet PLI with speed 700 m/s -> speed_cm_s=70000 -> struct.pack fails. Lower priority than altitude since most LICHEN use cases are ground/slow-moving assets.
close_reason: Fixed: Added UINT16_MAX constant and speed clamping (0 to 65535 cm/s) in both compact_cot.py files to prevent struct.pack overflow for speeds exceeding 655.35 m/s
